name: io.github.chaoz23/loudcheck
title: loudcheck
description: Loudness compliance verdicts against formal broadcast standards (EBU R128, ATSC A/85): pass/fail with per-metric deltas, spec citations, and exact ffmpeg remediation. Requires ffmpeg >= 5 on PATH.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: install the MCP extra (the core package is dependency-free)

packageArguments.description: run the MCP stdio server instead of the CLI
